title: calea sessiliflora
intro: Calea sessiliflora, also known as Mexican damiana, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its sedative, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. Calea sessiliflora has been used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and menopausal symptoms, due to its ability to promote relaxation and reduce stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
